TextView.android:text: To record call audio on OxygenOS / ColorOS and Android 14+, you must enable the accessibility helper. This acts as a system bypass hook.
If disabled, the app records from your active audio route (earpiece, Bluetooth, etc.) without automatic speaker switching.
Calls from the following numbers will be automatically recorded.
Disconnect the active phone call by clicking the power lock button.
Enable tactile vibration response when pressing dialpad keys.
Place phone face-down to immediately mute incoming ringtones.
Pulse the camera flashlight when receiving an incoming call.
View calling stats and top callers.
Calls from numbers added to the allowlist will not be blocked.
When calls or messages are blocked
VIP contacts and numbers added to the allowlist will not be blocked.
